candidate_definitions.text: TensorRT deployment for CenterPoint Lidar Detection Model.
The project implement CenterPoint by TensorRT, where CenterPoint is an 3D object detection model using center points in the bird eye view.
Export CenterPoint PonintPillars ONNX Model For TensorRT

Welcome to CenterPoint! This project is fork from [tianweiy/CenterPoint](https://github.com/tianweiy/CenterPoint). I implement some code to export CenterPoint-PonintPillars ONNX model and deploy the onnx model using TensorRT.
